title: Tonin
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Nickname}} {{Droid |type=Rebel |image= |name="Tonin" |homeworld= |birth= |death= |creator= |manufacturer=[[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]] |line=[[R-series/Legends|R-series]] |model=[[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droid]] |class=[[Astromech droid/Legends|Astromech droid]] |cost= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Masculine programming]] |pronouns=new |sensor= |plating= |armament= |equipment= |affiliation=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] }} {{Quote|I may get myself killed here, and if I do, the same will probably happen to you.''"
"''I'M GLAD I'M HERE.''"
"''Me, too. You're my only friend, Tonin.... I had an idea as to how we can destroy ''Iron Fist''. You'll have to do most of the work. But if we succeed, you may become the most famous R2 unit ever. Well, maybe second, after Artoo-Detoo.''"
"''THAT WOULD BE NICE.''"|Gara Petothel and Tonin|''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]''}} '''Tonin''' ("'''Little Atton'''" in an [[Aldivy|Aldivian]] dialect) was an [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droid]] owned by [[Gara Petothel]]. ==History== {{Quote|Tonin. Aldivian colloquialism. Definition: Little Atton.|Gara Petothel|}} When Gara Petothel, under the guise of Lara Notsil, destroyed [[Atton Repness]]'s [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] ring aboard the training [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|frigate]] ''[[Tedevium]]'', she was assigned Repness's former [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] and [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]]—both of which were top-of-the-line. After wiping the [[Droid/Legends|droid's]] memory, she renamed him Tonin, which meant "Little Atton" in an [[Aldivy|Aldivian]] dialect. Tonin was a silver-white droid with blood-red trim, and he had all the latest tools and upgrades found in late-model R2 units. Tonin had a unique personality, and he developed an attachment to Petothel. When she was forced to flee [[Wraith Squadron]], Tonin went with her. She modified his systems to disguise her true intentions—to sabotage [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']]. Tonin worked toward Petothel's objective while she performed her duties as one of [[Zsinj]]'s intelligence officers. He took control of a large number of [[MSE-6 series repair droid/Legends|MSE-6-series repair droids]], and directly sliced into ''Iron Fist's'' main computers. Tonin came to the conclusion that he was smarter than ''Iron Fist's'' computers, and he may have been correct. In his role as "king of the droids," Tonin managed to gather valuable intelligence on ''Iron Fist'' and take control of vital systems. At the end of the [[Battle of Vahaba]], Tonin modified ''Iron Fist's'' [[Navigation computer/Legends|navigation computer]] data to strand the ship in the [[Selaggis system/Legends|Selaggis system]]. He then ordered his army of mouse droids to disable the [[Warship/Legends|warship's]] [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] system. As Zsinj's engineers worked to restore hyperdrive capability, Tonin joined the [[Project Chubar]] escapees in fleeing the [[Battle of Selaggis]]. Tonin and Petothel were last known to be on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], where they intended to use a stolen [[Sentinel-class landing craft/Legends|''Sentinel''-class landing craft]] to start a shipping business with [[Kolot]], an [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] pilot who Petothel rescued from the ''Iron Fist''. ==Appearances== *''[[X-Wing: Iron Fist]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Iron Fist (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} *''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Solo Command (unabridged audiobook)}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Tonin }} [[Category:Droids of the Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[Category:Droids with masculine programming]] [[Category:R2-series astromech droids]] [[Category:Wraith Squadron personnel]]
